page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.16xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 64 physical cores of an AMD EPYC 7H12 processor running at a base frequency of 2.6 GHz. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of x86_64 system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a clear contrast between single-core and multi-threaded performance. The single-core stress-ng CPU performance is positioned in the bottom 10%, and single-threaded gzip compression is weak. However, the instance excels in highly parallelized operations. The Passmark CPU score and CPU encryption tests both rank in the top 25%, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is also strong. Memory bandwidth and database operations consistently perform within the average range.

Given its high core count and 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance provides a cost-efficient profile for highly parallelized, compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive per-core memory allocations. It is well-suited for multi-threaded batch processing, data decompression, cryptography-heavy applications, and static web serving. It is less optimal for single-threaded applications or workloads requiring local NVMe storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs and 64 physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 7H12 processor at 2.6 GHz. It is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate a trade-off: single-core performance is relatively low, but multi-threaded capabilities are strong, as evidenced by high Passmark CPU, encryption, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression scores. This hardware profile is highly efficient for parallel processing tasks, cryptography, and multi-threaded batch workloads, though it is less suited for single-thread bound applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 64 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-threaded performance for parallel workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A high-density, compute-optimized platform featuring 64 dedicated AMD EPYC cores for highly parallelized multi-threaded processing workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD EPYC 7H12 vCPUs and 128 GB of system memory
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Strong multi-threaded performance in encryption and decompression benchmarks
No local storage or GPU hardware included in the configuration
Optimized for parallel batch processing and cryptography workloads
